Praxis ships features when real usage pulls them for it, not on a fixed
schedule — an issue that names the concrete pull is much more likely to
land than a general suggestion.

## Prior art you've checked

Praxis mirrors existing patterns rather than inventing new ones. Is there a
similar package, emitter, or command already in the repo this could extend
or copy the shape of?
